name: io.github.ebeirne/lians
title: Lians — Financial-Grade Agent Memory
description: Bitemporal memory for AI agents. SEC 17a-4 audit chain, GDPR crypto-shred, information barriers.

environmentVariables.name: LIANS_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Lians server (self-hosted or cloud)

environmentVariables.name: LIANS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key with read and write scopes

environmentVariables.name: LIANS_AGENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Agent identifier used as the memory namespace
